title: AgalarMC Vanilla
description: A vanilla compatible modpack that solely boosts fps and improve visuals.
body:
# **AgalarMC Vanilla**

![Mami wearing an enchanted diamond helmet while holding an enchanted diamond sword, looking menacingly to the screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e39876d80760deed738ee40d41b9ae908fe51b74_0.webp)

- A client side modpack for AgalarMC Vanilla server that improves both your frames and visuals. Some features like voice chat require server side installation but it's completely vanilla compatible if you are okay with not using those features. ( **Some multiplayer servers might flag a few mods as cheating so use it on your own risk: *Freecam, Litematica's easy place feature, No Chat Reports*** )

## **Features**:

- 📈**Huge FPS Improvement** using [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast), [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix), [EnhancedBlockEntities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe), [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux), [FasterRandom](https://modrinth.com/mod/faster-random) and lots of other mods!

- 🔊**Voice Chat** feature with [SimpleVoiceChat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)!

- 🌄Lots of **Visual Improvements** like [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (shader support), [Voxy](https://github.com/m3t4f1v3/voxy) (LOD support, which is basically infinite render distance), [HoldMyItems](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) (first person item animations) and MANY more!

- ⏫Lots of **Quality of Life Improvements** like [ScreenshotGallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-gallery) (in-game screenshot viewer), [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) (in-game resource and shader pack downloader), [CubesWithoutBorders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) (borderless fullscreen) and much more!

- 🏃**Animated Entities and Players** using [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension)! (In some cases it can reduce your frame rate up to one third, and low-spec devices may not be able to handle it smoothly. Test your devices performance with theese packs on and off and decide for yourself.)

### ***Current Issues***:


- This modpack is still on beta so expect some minor conficlts and bugs; allthough minor or not, until these bugs are solved the pack will stay like this. Here are some of them:

- Enchantment Glint Outline is not compatible with 3D Armor so choose one to use.

- Voxy mod is not compatible with normal shaders you have to use the spesific shaders that support voxy, or you can just disable shaders.

- Photon Shaderpack's Voxy suported version:
https://github.com/sixthsurge/photon/tree/voxy-support

- All current Shaderpacks that support Voxy:
https://samalando.com/voxy/shaders



Also try [AgalarMC Create!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/agalarmc-create)
